item.title: TheSundayGame: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 8min Youngsters Eoin Cully and Ben Loakman played a key role on their Leinster Champion
item.description: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 8min Youngsters Eoin Cully and Ben Loakman played a key role on their Leinster Championship debuts and the pacy duo contributed 1-07 in total. #RTEgaa De rte.ie 642

item.title:

"I'd say you were one of t
item.description:
Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 22min "It's fair to say ye were written off in that one Luke"
"I'd say you were one of them were ya"
A very happy Luke Loughlin (he got 6 from play in 51 mins) is coming up on the show later 17 3 mil
The GAA @officialgaa · 23min REPORT: @KildareGAA eventually shrugged off @CLGLaois spirited resistance in an entertaining @gaaleinster SFC Quarter-Final #GAA De gaa.ie 1 3 2 mil

item.title: TheSundayGame: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 36min The panel reflect on the opening weekend of the hurling championship, in particul
item.description: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 36min The panel reflect on the opening weekend of the hurling championship, in particular Kilkenny's defeat in Leinster, with Liam Sheedy arguing that Derek Lyng doesn't have the pipeline of talent available to him 19 5 mil
